title: Get in Touch
subtitle: I'm open to frontend roles, remote/hybrid opportunities, and interesting product teams.

intro.paragraph: If you’re hiring for a React/TypeScript front-end role (remote or hybrid) or working on a product team that values clean UX and performance, send a message. Share the role context and what you’re building, and I’ll reply via email.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent! You'll receive a reply on email shortly.
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
form.errorInvalid: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.countryCodeInvalid: Please enter a valid country code (e.g. +91)
